title: The Witch with One Year to Live
overview: Apprentice witch Meg Raspberry is told she will die in a year unless she collects one thousand tears of joy.

title: The Apprentice Witch and the People of Lapis
overview: Meg's friend Fine requests her help with fixing a watch.

title: Wisdom Visits From the East
overview: Meg is visited by Inori, the Witch of Wisdom, while Faust is away on business.

title: Blessings With the Opening of the Gate
overview: Meg helps Sophie, the Witch of Blessings and one of the Seven Sages, open the gate at the Otherworld Festival.

title: Flowers Bloom in the Festival Night Sky
overview: While preparing for the parade, Meg and Sophie meet Marie, a woman looking for the man she met a year ago.

title: An Evening Sky Without Magic
overview: Meg brags to Faust about how easy it has become to collect tears and is forbidden from using magic.

title: Words and Disasters and Ceremonies
overview: Meg attends a special magic ceremony held once every 20 years.

title: The Family Bewitched by a Devil
overview: Meg sees a burn-like scar on a girl's neck that is only visible to her.

title: The Old Giant Tree Sleeps
overview: The sacred tree of Lapis has become polluted by magic and must be removed to prevent further damage.

title: The Bell of Blessings Rings With the Sound of the Waves (Part One)
overview: Meg and Inori visit Aquamarine, a resort destination with a cutting-edge medical facility.

title: The Bell of Blessings Rings With the Sound of the Waves (Part Two)
overview: Meg and Jack experience a breakthrough in their research, and a massive disaster threatens the entire island.

title: The People I Love
overview: Meg has mysterious nightmares about a lone witch floating above a destroyed city.
